english translation text:
Repeat the following 100 times or as many times as possible.
376

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا اَبَا عَبْدِ ٱللَّهِ
english translation text:
Peace be upon You,
O Abu Abdullah
and upon the souls that gathered in Your courtyard.
Peace of Allah be upon You from me forever
as long as I am existent and as long as there are day and night.

arabic text: وَلاَ جَعَلَهُ ٱللَّهُ آخِرَ ٱلْعَهْدِ مِنِّي لِزِيَارَتِكُمْ
english translation text: May Allah not cause this visit to be the last of my visit to you all.
and upon the companions of Al-Husayn.
